name: HEART VALVES
definition: separates LV outflow tract from ascending aorta by a valve composed of annulus, bicuspid valve (= 2 leaflets) anchored on mitral valve annulus + connected to LV papillary D-shaped ring within L atrioventricular groove; imbedded within myocardium as part of separates RV outflow tract from main pulmonary artery by a semilunar valve composed of 3 right atrioventricular valve separating RA from RV; anchored on tricuspid valve annulus +
dominant_finding: pulmonic valve just inferior to left mainstem bronchus
distribution: aortic valve resides in profile superior to this line overlying the thoracic spine
discriminating_features: aortic valve resides in profile superior to this line overlying the thoracic spine
pulmonic valve just inferior to left mainstem bronchus
mitral valve resides inferior to this line centrally located within cardiac silhouette
tricuspid valve inferior to this line more basilar and midline
aortic valve resides superior to this line

general: aortic valve resides in profile superior to this line overlying the thoracic spine
